description: Beyond the Veil Patch 1 (1 December 2022) — Roads of Avalon Changes, Mists Changes, Mount Changes, Other Changes, Combat Balance Changes (Axes, Bows, Crossbows, Daggers, War Gloves, Armors, Helmets), Fixes.

sections.heading: Roads of Avalon Changes
items: Direct connections between Hideout zones redirected to raid zones — increases likelihood of raid zones having two separate connections at once
In non-Hideout Roads zones: Randomized Dungeon Maps no longer usable; Static Randomized Dungeons no longer appear in enchanted form; Increased Static Randomized Dungeon rewards
Resource mobs (Elemental, Dryad, Cougar, Wood Spirit) in Roads now spawn with full charges
Decreased knockback of Avalonian Monk and damage of the standard version; Added immediate spell cast to Monk, Warrior, Mage; Decreased Warrior attack power
Roads of Avalon group portals returned to their 7 charge maximums
Unstable Roads portal in Brecilien party slots increased to 7 to match group portals
Zerg bubble threshold in non-raid Roads zones increased from 6 to 8
Spawn rate of Hideout Power Cores in the Roads increased by 70%
sections.searchable_text: Roads of Avalon Hideout zones raid zones Randomized Dungeon Maps Static Randomized Dungeons enchanted rewards resource mobs Elemental Dryad Cougar Wood Spirit Avalonian Monk Warrior Mage group portals 7 charges Unstable Brecilien Zerg bubble 6 8 Power Cores 70%

sections.heading: Mists Changes
items: Tier 5 Mythical mobs now only spawn in lethal Mists; Tier 4 Mythical mobs still exclusively spawn in nonlethal Mists
Tier 5 Mythical mob loot tables decreased, but spawn frequencies increased to offset; goal is for T5 mobs to always drop at least one artifact
All mythical mobs adjusted to spawn +50% more frequently to account for missed spawns
Long Hostile Dismount Cooldown in the Mists increased from 10s to 12s
sections.searchable_text: Mists Tier 5 Mythical mobs lethal nonlethal loot spawn frequency artifact Hostile Dismount Cooldown 10s 12s

sections.heading: Mount Changes
sections.searchable_text: Mount Changes mount-up times Non-Battle Mounts 3s Battle Mounts 10s Saddled Greywolf Elite Terrorbird Elite Winter Bear Elite Wild Boar Elite Bighorn Ram Elite Swamp Salamander Elite Greywolf Spring Cottontail Siege Ballista Venom Basilisk Flame Basilisk Elder's Command Mammoth Avalonian Basilisk Item Power 1000

subsections.heading: Non-Battle Mount Mount-Up Times
subsections.searchable_text: Non-Battle Mounts 2s 3s Saddled Greywolf Elite Terrorbird Winter Bear Wild Boar Bighorn Ram Swamp Salamander Greywolf Spring Cottontail

changes.raw_text: Saddled Greywolf, Elite Terrorbird, Elite Winter Bear, Elite Wild Boar, Elite Bighorn Ram, Elite Swamp Salamander, Elite Greywolf, Spring Cottontail: Mount-up time: 2s → 3s
notes: Applies to: Saddled Greywolf, Elite Terrorbird, Elite Winter Bear, Elite Wild Boar, Elite Bighorn Ram, Elite Swamp Salamander, Elite Greywolf, Spring Cottontail

subsections.heading: Battle Mount Mount-Up Times
subsections.searchable_text: Battle Mounts 10s Siege Ballista 15s Venom Basilisk 15s Flame Basilisk 15s Elder's Command Mammoth 25s

subsections.heading: Avalonian Basilisk
subsections.searchable_text: Avalonian Basilisk Item Power 1000 HP 1239 1254 HP Regen 12.39 12.54

changes.raw_text: Increased Item Power of Avalonian Basilisk to 1000. HP Increase: 1239 → 1254; HP Regen Increase: 12.39 → 12.54
notes: Item Power increased to 1000 to match T7 mounts

sections.heading: Other Changes
items: Loadouts now separated by Personal and Guild in dropdown menu
Season 16 furniture items placeable
Improved visibility of enchantment effects for .4 weapons
Added unrestricted PvP zones to mob camps in the Mists
The lingering effect of the Invisibility Shrine buff after reveal no longer provides invincibility
sections.searchable_text: Other Changes Loadouts Personal Guild Season 16 furniture enchantment .4 weapons PvP zones Mists Invisibility Shrine buff invincibility

sections.heading: Combat Balance Changes
sections.searchable_text: Combat Balance Changes Axes Bows Crossbows Daggers War Gloves Armors Helmets

subsections.heading: Axes
subsections.searchable_text: Axes Razor Cut Bear Paws Range 12m 10m Energy Cost 20 16

changes.raw_text: Razor Cut (Bear Paws): Range: 12m → 10m; Energy Cost: 20 → 16

subsections.heading: Bows
subsections.searchable_text: Bows Frost Shot Cooldown 15s 18s Ray of Light Cooldown 14s 12s Hit Delay 0.8s 0.6s Standtime 0.4s 0.3s

changes.raw_text: Ray of Light (all Bows): Cooldown: 14s → 12s; Hit Delay: 0.8s → 0.6s; Standtime: 0.4s → 0.3s

subsections.heading: Crossbows
subsections.searchable_text: Crossbows Caltrops Move Speed Increase 20% 30% Duration 2s 3s Slow Strength 40% 30%

changes.raw_text: Caltrops: Move Speed Increase: 20% → 30%; Move Speed Duration: 2s → 3s; Slow Strength: 40% → 30%

subsections.heading: Daggers
subsections.searchable_text: Daggers Lunging Stabs Bloodletter 40% Health cooldown rate reduce 40% other slot

changes.raw_text: Lunging Stabs (Bloodletter): Hitting player below 40% Health no longer increases cooldown rate. Instead, hitting player below 40% reduces ability cooldown by 40% (other slot cooldowns no longer affected).
notes: Hitting player below 40% Health no longer increases cooldown rate
Instead, hitting player below 40% reduces ability cooldown by 40% (other slot cooldowns no longer affected)

subsections.heading: War Gloves
subsections.searchable_text: War Gloves Triple Kick Cooldown 15s 18s Falcon Smash Battle Bracers Range 15m 13m

subsections.heading: Armors
subsections.searchable_text: Armors Bloodlust Mercenary Jacket Heal per Tick 42 54 Number of Ticks 9 7

changes.raw_text: Bloodlust (Mercenary Jacket): Heal per Tick: 42 → 54; Number of Ticks: 9 → 7

subsections.heading: Helmets
subsections.searchable_text: Helmets Force Field Cloth Helmets Knockback Distance 12m 9m Poison Mage Cowl First Damage Tick 1s 0s Total Ticks 5 3 Damage per Tick 39.93 60 Retaliate Hunter Hood Reflected Damage 70% 100%

changes.raw_text: Poison (Mage Cowl): First Damage Tick: 1s → 0s; Total Ticks: 5 → 3; Damage per Tick: 39.93 → 60

sections.heading: Fixes
items: Mistcloud (Mistwalker Jacket) conceals Celestial Censer and Torch
Fixed issue where Spider Thread (Duskweaver Helmet) stat block disappeared during multispell
Fixed issue where mount-up could be interrupted by casts that deal no damage but slow, silence, or root
Fixed issue where Purge (Fiend Cowl) did not purge Hyperfocus
Fixed issue where Mythical Web (Duskweaver Armor) falsely purged Iron Will
Fixed issue where Hyper Focus (Feyscale Hat) prevented Armor Piercer (Cursed Staffs) from hitting player
Fixed issue where Wild Magic's Storm Shield (Feyscale Robe) could chain trigger with Requite
Crafting Fey Armor now fills Laborer Journals as intended
Fixed issue where opening Guild Details UI closed world map
Fixed issue where travel to Guild Island with same name as character was not possible via Travel Planner or Island Merchant
Fixed issue where offline timers of Guild Members displayed incorrectly
Fixed issue where players could not travel to Guild Island set as Home with equipment
Fixed issue where players under Outland city shrine buff could receive Outlaw status
Invincibility effect of Outland shrine buff now breaks with additional world interactions
Various additional localization, UI, terrain and animation fixes
